classification_rationale: This release promotes ProductOS to V7.2.0 after the mission-first PM workflow slice passed Ralph-loop inspection, validation, fix, and revalidation.
summary: ProductOS V7.2.0 is the stable release for mission-first PM workflow slice.
upgrade_actions: Adopt the promoted Mission-first PM workflow slice in the current ProductOS operating flow.
Use the automatic Ralph-gated release promotion command for future successful slices.
Keep product-specific work outside shared repo surfaces and promote only reusable repo assets.
